dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Scott Bessent defends US strikes on Iran, says ‘you have to escalate to de-escalate’

dailyNews.title: US Southwest Heat Wave Tumbles Records, Raises Fire Risk

dailyNews.description: Just Facts President James Agresti told Fox News Digital that Gov. Gavin Newsom's claims that California is more tax-friendly than Texas and Florida simply don't add up.

dailyNews.title: Trump mocks 'discombobulated' Schumer over Democrats' near gaffe on funding ICE
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump mocked Chuck Schumer after the Senate minority leader accidentally said "We must fund ICE" on the Senate floor amid the DHS funding shutdown fight.

dailyNews.title: Far-left activists stay in 5-star Cuban hotel as island suffers total blackout
dailyNews.description: CodePink sponsored flights to Cuba to protest President Donald Trump's sanctions, but the group faced backlash for staying in luxury hotels.

dailyNews.title: Israel Thought It Could Spur Rebellion Inside Iran. That Hasn’t Happened.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s hopes that an Israeli plan to ignite an internal uprising against Iran’s theocratic government could bring the war to a swift end have so far been dashed.

dailyNews.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines that have been frustrating passengers at U.S. airports.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Explored Bipartisan Deal to Rein in Immigration Crackdown
dailyNews.description: The G.O.P. senator President Trump chose to lead the Department of Homeland Security privately discussed concessions the White House has repeatedly rejected.

dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Officials scramble to carry out Trump's directive on ICE agents at airports
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents will assist TSA agents at airports as delays and security staffing shortages continue to worsen.
